song_name: Taylor Swift - Cruel Summer - Olivia Rodrigo - Deja Vu
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
* = one strum


[Cruel Summer]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  (Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Fever dream high in the quiet of the night[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]                       [ch]F#m[/ch]
You know that I caught it (oh yeah, you’re right, I want it)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Bad, bad boy, shiny toy with a price[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
You know that I bought it[/tab]


[Deja Vu]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
So when you gonna tell her that we did that too?[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
She thinks it's special, but it's all re-used[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
That was our place, I found it first[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]
I made the jokes you tell to her when she's with you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
Do you get déjà vu when she's with you?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Do you get déjà vu, hmm?[/tab]


[Cruel Summer]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
And it’s new, the shape of your body[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
It’s blue, the feeling I’ve got[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
And it’s ooh-ooh ooh whoa-oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It’s a cruel summer[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]
It’s cool, that’s what I tell ’em[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#m[/ch]
No rules in breakable heaven[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#m[/ch]
But ooh-ooh ooh whoa-oh[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
It’s a cruel summer[/tab]


[Deja Vu]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
Do you call her, almost say my name?[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]E[/ch]
'Cause let's be honest, we kinda do sound the same[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
Another actress[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                                  [ch]A[/ch]
I hate to think that I was just your type[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
And I bet that she knows Billy Joel[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
'Cause you played her "Uptown Girl"[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
You’re singing it together[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now I bet you even tell her how you love her[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
In between the chorus and[/tab]


[Cruel Summer]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  I’m drunk in the back of the car[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m[/ch]
And I cried like a baby coming home from the bar (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   Said "I’m fine", but it wasn’t true[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
I don’t wanna keep secrets just to keep you[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]A[/ch]
And I snuck in through the garden gate[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#m[/ch]
Every night that summer just to seal my fate (oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
   And I scream "For whatever it’s worth[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                                             N.C.
I love you, ain’t that the worst thing you ever heard?"[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]*
He looks up, grinning like a devil[/tab]


[Deja Vu]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Strawberry ice cream in Malibu[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
Don't act like we didn’t do that shit too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
You're trading jackets like we used to do[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]
(Yeah, everything is all re-used)[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Play her piano, but she doesn't know (Oh, oh)[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]
That I was the one who taught you Billy Joel (Oh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]
A different girl now, but there's nothing new[/tab]


[Cruel Summer]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                                             [ch]A[/ch]*
I love you, ain’t that the worst thing you ever heard?"[/tab]
